No. I

Your persistence

Nobody has fought for me the way you do. That kind of love is rare, Boba.

No. II

How deeply you see me

You notice everything I don't say out loud. You always have.

Two people who deeply understand each other, and will always be together for all the birthdays still to come.

A whole year older, a whole year more you.

To more adventures 🥂

Act I

"Another year of watching you become exactly who you were always meant to be."

I don't take it for granted, getting to witness this. Every birthday is a milestone, but this one feels different. I'm just grateful I get to be right here, beside you, for it.

Act II

"Whatever this year brings you, I hope it's everything you deserve — and then some."

Happy birthday, Le Lame. Before you blow out those candles, I need you to know how loved you are tonight. This whole night is your gift, start to finish.

Act III

"And once the room empties out and it's just us —"

I plan on being very close to you. Slow, warm, no rush. Still your favourite part of the night. I love you boba a lot 🥲

By Invitation Only

The Back Room

21

Finally 21.

Every year of you has been worth the wait. This one especially.

Guest List Only

"my hands were made to hold you, and you only"

Happy birthday, my love. Every year that goes by, I want you closer, not further. Our bodies were made to fit each other — forever, till death do us part 🥲

Now go blow out your candles, birthday girl 😂❤️

One Wish

Make A Wish

Whatever you wished for, I hope it's already true. Happy birthday, Le Lame. 🕯️❤️

R.S.V.P.

To my pretty and loving princess, it's your day. Continue to shine and flourish. Continue being this spectacular lady you are (that's right, you're no longer a girl, you're a lady 😂)

Ready for your birthday surprise?

It's already on its way 🥲

Yes

One More Reply

Continue being my wife?

You know the answer, Boba 🥲

Always
RSVP Confirmed

Happy Birthday. Truly.

I genuinely wish you a happy birthday.

You said yes, of course you did. I hope your day remains remarkable and memorable.

Cheers to more birthdays, and to a new chapter — or shall I say, cheers to a new season of L & K.

❤️ Always yours — your person
